hero.title: Transforming Spaces, Creating Dreams
hero.subtitle: Luxury Interior Design & Custom Furniture
hero.description: Experience the pinnacle of design excellence with Maraseem Home Decor. We create bespoke living spaces that reflect your unique style and elevate your everyday experience.

about.title: About Maraseem
about.subtitle: Crafting Excellence Since 2010
about.description: Maraseem Home Decor stands at the forefront of luxury interior design and custom furniture manufacturing in Saudi Arabia. Our passion for creating exceptional living spaces drives every project we undertake.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary experiences through innovative design, superior craftsmanship, and unparalleled attention to detail.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the region's most trusted partner for luxury interior design, setting new standards of excellence and inspiring the future of living spaces.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue perfection in every detail, from concept to completion.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push boundaries and embrace new technologies and design trends.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We build trust through transparency, honesty, and reliability.

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: We honor traditional techniques while embracing modern methods.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive Design Solutions
services.description: From concept to completion, we offer a full spectrum of interior design and custom furniture services tailored to your unique needs.

interiorDesign.title: Interior Design
interiorDesign.description: Complete interior design solutions for residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces.

residential.title: Residential Design
residential.description: Transform your home into a personalized sanctuary with our bespoke residential design services.

commercial.title: Commercial Design
commercial.description: Create inspiring work environments that enhance productivity and reflect your brand identity.

hospitality.title: Hospitality Design
hospitality.description: Design memorable experiences for hotels, restaurants, and entertainment venues.

customFurniture.title: Custom Furniture
customFurniture.description: Handcrafted furniture pieces designed and manufactured to your exact specifications.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: End-to-end project management ensuring seamless execution from concept to completion.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Portfolio of Excellence
projects.description: Discover our collection of completed projects showcasing our expertise in creating exceptional spaces.

furniture.title: Custom Furniture
furniture.subtitle: Handcrafted to Perfection
furniture.description: Every piece of furniture we create is a unique work of art, designed specifically for your space and lifestyle.

materials.title: Materials Library

materials.description: Explore our extensive collection of premium materials sourced from around the world.

contact.description: Ready to transform your space? Get in touch with our team to discuss your project and schedule a consultation.
